home.manifesto.title: Our Mission
home.manifesto.text: We grow the drum and bass scene in Oslo. Not just parties, but a real community. A safe space for heads, new talent and underground culture.
home.membership.title: Join the Movement
home.membership.text: Earn points, unlock rewards, shape the scene.

membership.tiers.core.desc: The backbone. Shape lineups, backstage access, limited merch.
about.title: About Singularity
about.story.title: Our Story
about.story.text: Singularity started as a simple idea: bring together people who love deep, dark, driving bass music. In Oslo, the DnB scene was fragmented — small pockets of heads scattered across the city. We wanted to change that. What began as a few underground warehouse sessions has grown into a community-driven movement. We book local talent alongside international acts, build our own soundsystems and stage rigs, and create spaces where everyone feels welcome — whether you're a lifelong junglist or hearing a reese bass for the first time.
about.values.title: Our Values
about.values.community.text: Everything we do serves the community. Profit is secondary to people.
about.values.inclusivity.text: Open doors for all backgrounds. The dancefloor is the great equalizer.
about.values.diy.text: Build it yourself. Our soundsystems, our visuals, our scene.
about.values.talent.text: Give stage time to rising DJs and producers. Everyone starts somewhere.
about.contact.text: Want to play? Collaborate? Just say hey?
footer.tagline: Building the bass music scene in Oslo, one party at a time.
supporters.title: Our Supporters
supporters.text: Thank you to those who keep the underground alive. Your support helps us build the bass music scene in Oslo.
membership.platform: Create an account, buy tickets with the same email, and your RP will be added to your profile. The more RP you collect, the more rewards you unlock.
membership.instructions: Show your profile at the door and keep collecting.
membership.how.title: How to get RP
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Singularity, we respect your privacy. This policy explains how we collect and use your data when you use our platform.
privacy.sections.who.text: Singularity is a drum and bass collective based in Oslo, Norway. We provide a platform for event details, community interaction, and member rewards.
privacy.sections.data.text: We collect information you provide directly, such as your email and display name when creating an account, and any comments you post on events.
privacy.sections.purpose.text: We use your data to manage your account, track event attendance (Rave Points), and facilitate community discussions. Authentication and security are handled through Supabase.
privacy.sections.storage.text: Your data is stored securely in Supabase databases and hosted on Vercel. We use industry-standard encryption and security measures to protect your information.
privacy.sections.rights.text: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You can manage your profile settings or contact us for assistance.
privacy.contact: For any questions, reach out to us at: info@singularity-oslo.no
cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: We believe in a clean, non-intrusive web experience.
cookies.status: Our website currently uses only essential technical cookies required for core functionality, such as keeping you signed in and ensuring security. We do not use third-party tracking, analytics, or advertising cookies.
cookies.changes: If we introduce any non-essential cookies in the future, we will update this page and ask for your consent.
